_comment: Single source of truth for all BLE UUIDs. Keys are UPPER_SNAKE_CASE so codegen can drop them straight into C #defines and JS named exports without any case translation. Edit this file, then run `make gen-uuids` (also runs automatically on `make compile`). Do NOT edit the generated files directly — `tools/gen-uuids.py` will overwrite them.
_hub_contract: Cross-project channel mapping (MOTOR<->pwm with the +-100-percent vs +-255-duty scale conversion, LED+RGB<->set_led, TELEMETRY<->sys) is canonical in better-robotics/hub CONTRACT.md, 'The BLE transport (workbench)'. Keep that section in sync when a mapped char's payload changes.
